title: DELETED
author: Ferreira de Souza, Érica
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In the replication package you can find the data extraction form and the scripts used in forward snowballing. A data extraction form was created to gather all relevant data from the identified studies and manage the selection process in the systematic mapping. This catalog assists us in data extraction and synthesis procedures and can be used by potential interested parties, for example, for updating or replication.
steps_raw: In the replication package you can find the data extraction form and the scripts used in forward snowballing. A data extraction form was created to gather all relevant data from the identified studies and manage the selection process in the systematic mapping. This catalog assists us in data extraction and synthesis procedures and can be used by potential interested parties, for example, for updating or replication.
